pages.title: Phase I — The Awakening
pages.text: $(bold)Core mods: Immersive Engineering, Ars Nouveau, Tinkers' Construct, Create, Thermal$(br2)The foundation phase. No magic systems. No digital storage. Just iron, fire, and steel.$(br2)Your goal: build a Coke Oven, run it until you have steel, then craft the $(bold)Rusted Conduit Core$() to seal the phase.

pages.title: Key Milestones
pages.text: $(bold)1.$() Craft the Engineer's Workbench — gates all IE recipes$(br)$(bold)2.$() Build the Coke Oven — coal coke for the Blast Furnace$(br)$(bold)3.$() Build the Blast Furnace — produces steel ingots$(br)$(bold)4.$() Craft 16 steel ingots$(br)$(bold)5.$() Craft the Rusted Conduit Core — Phase I seal$(br2)Side objectives: Tinkers' tools, Ars Nouveau basics, Waystone at base, Nether run for quartz.

pages.title: Rusted Conduit Core
pages.text: The Phase I seal recipe:$(br2)$(bold)Center:$() Thermal RF Coil$(br)$(bold)Top/Bottom:$() Iron Ingots$(br)$(bold)Left:$() Treated Wood (IE)$(br)$(bold)Right:$() Ars Nouveau Source Gem$(br2)All ingredients are Phase I accessible. Treated Wood requires Creosote Oil from your Coke Oven.
